description: Plaud transcript ingest workflow was not triggered during boot. CLAUDE.md boot sequence explicitly requires launching plaud-ingest as a background agent (fire-and-forget) during Phase 2. Step was skipped entirely with no note in the briefing.
correction: Launch plaud-ingest workflow during Phase 2 of every boot, in parallel with calendar and OmniFocus pulls. If skipped, flag it in the briefing rather than silently omitting it.
systemic_fix: Add plaud-ingest to boot checklist as a non-optional parallel step. If the workflow file is missing or fails to launch, report it explicitly in the briefing.
